_note: Synthetic de-identified transcript for testing — not real participant data.

segments.speaker: P01
segments.text: I suppose I just didn't know where to start, really. It felt like too much to explain.

segments.speaker: P01
segments.text: There was this kind of... I don't know. A sense that no one would quite understand what I meant.

segments.speaker: P01
segments.text: I kept thinking I should just get on with it. Not make a fuss.

segments.speaker: P01
segments.text: It's strange because I wanted help but I also didn't want to need it, if that makes sense.

segments.speaker: P01
segments.text: When she actually listened — really listened — I felt like I could breathe properly for the first time in weeks.
